sources.intro: Cj Gomez Private Resort: a place for your special occasions where you can feel like you're HOME
sources.address: 1860 (Rodriguez, Rizal area — exact pin shared on booking)
sources.notes: About + Photos scraped logged-out via Chrome DevTools. Email + mobile on Intro/About. Cover + profile + gallery via signed fbcdn download. Comment thread asks rate for 100 pax — large group / event venue. No street address beyond postal 1860.

contact.name: CJ Gomez Private Resort
contact.address: 1860 · Rodriguez, Rizal (exact pin shared on booking)

system.label: Venue booking & calendar admin
system.painHero: Special-occasion bookings for big groups pile up on Messenger — see which dates are open and confirm parties without double-booking.

quotation.packageScope: One-page responsive private-resort site only (amenities, gallery, packages, FAQ, contact). Admin preview is a sample; production booking system priced separately.
quotation.paymentTerms: 50% upfront to begin · 50% on delivery (not the full amount upfront)

outreach.notes: Initial quotation sent 2026-07-21 via outreachSchedule; auto follow-ups 3d1w (max 4).
